customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be of good quality, with positive feedback about its installation process, taste, and water quality. However, the reliability and durability receive mixed reviews - while some say it works well, others report it stops working completely, and while some praise the service, others complain about poor service. Moreover, opinions on value for money are divided, with some considering it a good value while others find it expensive. Additionally, durability is a concern, with customers reporting damage to the machine within two months of use.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Nice Product
reviews.body: Nice Product Till Now no problem had come

reviews.author: Pushpa
reviews.title: Excellent Water Purifier for Healthy Drinking Water
reviews.body: I am fully satisfied with KENT Supreme Star RO Water Purifier. The quality of water is really clean and tasty. Thanks to its RO+UV+UF filtration, and due to alkaline and copper enrichment technology. This model comes equipped with a digital display indicating water quality and filter conditions, thus, monitoring performance has never been easier. The large 9-liter water capacity and rapid speed of filtration mean that we will always have plenty of water available even in case of a power outage. I especially liked the presence of UV LED technology in the storage tank as it ensures the purity of

reviews.title: Good product and after sale support.
reviews.body: Installation done by engineer in a very professional manner.
